title: acmella biflora
intro: Acmella biflora, also known as toothache plant, is a tropical plant native to South America, characterized by its unique ability to numb the tongue when its leaves are chewed. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acmella biflora include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved oral health, making it a popular natural remedy for toothaches and other oral issues. Acmella biflora can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various ways.
